     The Numbers Business Report

Dark Waters (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $11,136,084Details
International Box Office $11,970,887
Worldwide Box Office $23,106,971
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $584,144
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $933,843
Total $1,517,987
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Inspired by the true story of Robert Bilott, an attorney who took on the DuPont company in an environmental suit exposing a decades-long history of chemical pollution in drinking water.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$102,606 (0.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.79 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:4 opening theaters/2,110 max. theaters, 2.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $14,538,696

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 22nd, 2019 (Limited) by Focus Features
December 6th, 2019 (Expands Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: November 27th, 2019 (Wide) (West Indies)
November 27th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
November 29th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
December 4th, 2019 (Wide) (Egypt)
December 5th, 2019 (Wide) (Jordan)
Video Release: March 3rd, 2020 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic content, some disturbing images and strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2599 (Cert #52368), 10/9/2019)
Running Time: 126 minutes
Plot point: Corporate Malfeasance, Scandal
Subgenre: Docudrama
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Participant Media, Killer Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
